context: Evaluates the agent's ability to validate plan structure against the standard trio and report issues.

checklist.name: Run validation script
checklist.description: Agent runs validate-context-frontmatter.sh on the plan file

checklist.name: Infer body convention
checklist.description: Agent scans H2 headings across existing plans to infer local standards

checklist.name: Report structural findings
checklist.description: Structural issues are included in the plan brief for all reviewers

checklist.name: Implementation architecture
checklist.description: Agent checks for Phases, Tasks, and Waves decomposition

checklist.name: Report includes findings
checklist.description: Final report's Structural Validation and Implementation Architecture sections are populated
